Business Analyst

@ Prof. Schumann

2023 - Today

ROLE OVERVIEW

As a Business Analyst at Prof. Schumann, I bridge the gap between business needs and technical implementation. My focus is on optimizing processes and ensuring that our software solutions deliver maximum value to our clients.

KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

  • > Requirement Engineering <
  • > Process Modeling (BPMN) <
  • > Stakeholder Management <
  • > Technical Documentation <
  • > Quality Assurance <

PROJECTS

Working on various digitalization projects in the credit management and insurance sectors, leveraging modern tech stacks and agile methodologies.
